user.title: Set up Pepa Sensory Arm
user.description: Configure your Pepa Sensory Arm integration with an OpenAI-compatible LLM endpoint.

data_description.name: A friendly name for this Pepa Sensory Arm instance
data_description.llm_base_url: OpenAI-compatible API endpoint (e.g., api.openai.com/v1 or localhost:11434/v1 for Ollama)
data_description.llm_api_key: API key for authentication (leave empty if not required)
data_description.llm_model: The model to use (e.g., gpt-4o-mini, llama3.1, etc.)
data_description.llm_temperature: Controls randomness (0.0-2.0). Lower is more focused, higher is more creative.
data_description.llm_keep_alive: How long Ollama keeps model in memory (e.g., 5m, 24h). Use -1 for indefinite.
data_description.llm_proxy_headers: Optional custom HTTP headers as JSON, e.g. X-Ollama-Backend: llama-cpp

context.title: Context Injection
context.description: Configure how Pepa Sensory Arm provides entity information to the LLM.

data_description.context_mode: Choose how to inject entity context: Direct (always include specified entities) or Vector DB (dynamically retrieve relevant entities). Applies only when using a full replacement prompt: the built-in default prompt sources device context from the entity-context sensor, and this setting has no effect on it.
data_description.context_format: Format for entity data: JSON (structured) or Natural Language (human-readable)
data_description.context_entities: Comma-separated list of entity IDs or patterns (e.g., sensor.temperature, light.*, climate.thermostat)

vector_db.title: Vector Database Configuration
vector_db.description: Configure ChromaDB integration for dynamic context retrieval.

data_description.vector_db_host: ChromaDB server hostname or IP address
data_description.vector_db_collection: Name of the collection containing entity embeddings
data_description.vector_db_embedding_provider: Choose between OpenAI or Ollama for generating embeddings
data_description.vector_db_embedding_base_url: Base URL for embedding API (e.g., localhost:11434 for Ollama)
data_description.vector_db_embedding_model: Model name (e.g., text-embedding-3-small for OpenAI, mxbai-embed-large for Ollama)
data_description.openai_api_key: Your OpenAI API key (only required if using OpenAI provider)
data_description.vector_db_top_k: Number of most relevant entities to retrieve
data_description.vector_db_similarity_threshold: Maximum L2 distance threshold (lower = stricter matching, typical range: 150-300)

history.title: Conversation History
history.description: Configure how conversation history is managed and included in context.

data_description.history_enabled: Include previous conversation turns in LLM context
data_description.history_max_messages: Maximum number of conversation turns to retain (0 for unlimited)
data_description.history_max_tokens: Token-based limit for history (0 for unlimited)
data_description.history_persist: Save conversation history across Home Assistant restarts

prompt.title: System Prompt
prompt.description: Configure the system prompt that guides the LLM's behavior.

data_description.use_default_prompt: Use Pepa Sensory Arm's built-in system prompt that explains tool usage and guidelines
data_description.custom_prompt_additions: Additional instructions to append to the system prompt (e.g., preferences, house rules)

tools.title: Tool Configuration
tools.description: Configure which tools are available to the LLM and execution limits.

data_description.enable_native_tools: Enable ha_control and ha_query tools for Home Assistant integration
data_description.max_tool_calls_per_turn: Maximum number of tool executions per conversation turn
data_description.tool_timeout_seconds: Maximum execution time for each tool call

external_llm.title: External LLM Tool (Optional)
external_llm.description: Configure an optional external LLM that the primary LLM can consult for complex queries.

data_description.external_llm_enabled: Expose query_external_llm tool to primary LLM for complex analysis and detailed explanations
data_description.external_llm_base_url: OpenAI-compatible API endpoint for external LLM
data_description.external_llm_api_key: API key for external LLM authentication
data_description.external_llm_max_tokens: Maximum tokens for external LLM responses
data_description.external_llm_auto_context: Automatically pass conversation history and entity context to external LLM

advanced.title: Advanced Settings
advanced.description: Configure advanced features and debugging options.

data_description.emit_events: Fire Home Assistant events for conversation tracking and automation triggers

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the LLM API. Please check the base URL and network connection.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid API key. Please check your credentials.
error.invalid_url: Invalid base URL format. Please enter a valid HTTP or HTTPS URL.
error.invalid_top_p: Top P must be between 0.0 and 1.0.
error.invalid_max_tokens: Max tokens must be a positive number.
error.invalid_entities: Invalid entity ID format or pattern.
error.vector_db_connection_failed: Failed to connect to ChromaDB. Please check host, port, and ensure ChromaDB is running.
error.vector_db_collection_not_found: ChromaDB collection not found. Please create the collection first.
error.invalid_top_k: Top K must be a positive integer.
error.invalid_similarity_threshold: Similarity threshold must be a positive number (typical range: 150-300).
error.invalid_history_max_messages: Max messages must be a non-negative integer.
error.invalid_history_max_tokens: Max tokens must be a non-negative integer.
error.invalid_tool_timeout: Tool timeout must be a positive number.
error.invalid_max_tool_calls: Max tool calls must be a positive integer.
error.external_llm_connection_failed: Failed to connect to external LLM API. Please check the configuration.
error.invalid_proxy_headers: Invalid proxy headers format. Must be valid JSON object with string keys and values.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please check the logs for details.

abort.already_configured: This Pepa Sensory Arm instance is already configured.
abort.single_instance_allowed: Only a single instance of Pepa Sensory Arm is allowed.

init.title: Configure Pepa Sensory Arm
init.description: Update your Pepa Sensory Arm configuration.

llm_settings.title: LLM Settings
llm_settings.description: Configure the primary LLM connection and parameters.

data_description.llm_base_url: OpenAI-compatible API endpoint (e.g., api.openai.com/v1 or localhost:11434/v1 for Ollama)
data_description.llm_temperature: Controls randomness (0.0-2.0). Lower is more focused, higher is more creative.
data_description.llm_keep_alive: How long Ollama keeps model in memory (e.g., 5m, 24h). Use -1 for indefinite.
data_description.llm_proxy_headers: Optional custom HTTP headers as JSON, e.g. X-Ollama-Backend: llama-cpp
data_description.thinking_enabled: Allow reasoning models to use extended thinking. Disable to automatically append /no_think to prompts for faster responses.

context_settings.title: Context Settings
context_settings.description: Configure how entity context is provided to the LLM.

data_description.context_mode: Choose how to inject entity context. Applies only when using a full replacement prompt: the built-in default prompt sources device context from the entity-context sensor, and this setting has no effect on it.
data_description.context_format: Format for entity data (JSON, Natural Language, or Hybrid)
data_description.direct_entities: Comma-separated list of entity IDs (e.g., sensor.temperature,light.*)
data_description.max_context_tokens: Maximum total tokens for context (entities + history + prompt). Increase if you have a model with large context window. Default: 8000.

vector_db_settings.title: Vector Database Settings
vector_db_settings.description: Configure ChromaDB connection and embedding settings.

data_description.vector_db_host: ChromaDB server hostname or IP address
data_description.vector_db_collection: Name of the collection containing entity embeddings
data_description.vector_db_embedding_provider: Choose between OpenAI or Ollama for generating embeddings
data_description.vector_db_embedding_base_url: Base URL for embedding API (e.g., localhost:11434 for Ollama)
data_description.vector_db_embedding_model: Model name (e.g., text-embedding-3-small for OpenAI, mxbai-embed-large for Ollama)
data_description.openai_api_key: Your OpenAI API key (only required if using OpenAI provider)
data_description.vector_db_top_k: Number of most relevant entities to retrieve
data_description.vector_db_similarity_threshold: Maximum L2 distance threshold (lower = stricter matching, typical range: 150-300)
data_description.chroma_placement: Remote connects to a ChromaDB server (host/port above). Embedded runs ChromaDB inside Home Assistant with no external service.
data_description.chroma_persist_dir: Directory for the embedded ChromaDB store, relative to the Home Assistant config directory. Only used when placement is Embedded.

data_description.history_enabled: Include previous conversation turns in LLM context
data_description.history_max_messages: Maximum number of conversation turns to retain
data_description.session_persistence_enabled: Maintain conversation context across multiple voice interactions from the same device. When disabled, each voice request starts a fresh conversation.
data_description.session_timeout: Time in minutes before voice sessions expire and start fresh (1-120 minutes)

prompt_settings.title: System Prompt
prompt_settings.description: Configure the system prompt that guides the LLM's behavior.

data_description.prompt_use_default: If unchecked, the LLM receives only the prompt you provide on the next step — no built-in instructions or device catalog are added automatically.
data_description.prompt_include_labels: Include entity and device labels in the system prompt for better context

prompt_settings_content.title: System Prompt Content
prompt_settings_content.description: Shown based on your previous choice: with the default prompt, choose whether to append custom additions; with the default prompt disabled, provide the full replacement prompt.

data_description.prompt_use_custom: If checked, the text below is spliced into the cacheable prefix of the default prompt.
data_description.prompt_custom_additions: Appended into the cacheable section of the default prompt. Jinja is rendered — see docs before using template calls.
data_description.prompt_custom: Full replacement system prompt. You are responsible for the entire prompt including device context and trailer.

tool_settings.title: Tool Configuration
tool_settings.description: Configure tool execution limits and timeouts.

data_description.tools_max_calls_per_turn: Maximum number of tool executions per conversation turn
data_description.tools_timeout: Maximum execution time for each tool call

external_llm_settings.title: External LLM Configuration
external_llm_settings.description: Configure optional external LLM tool that the primary LLM can consult.

data_description.external_llm_enabled: Expose query_external_llm tool to primary LLM
data_description.external_llm_base_url: OpenAI-compatible API endpoint for external LLM
data_description.external_llm_api_key: API key for external LLM authentication
data_description.external_llm_max_tokens: Maximum tokens for external LLM responses
data_description.external_llm_tool_description: Description of when to use the external LLM
data_description.external_llm_auto_include_context: Automatically pass context to external LLM

memory_settings.title: Memory System Configuration
memory_settings.description: Configure the long-term memory system for persistent learning across conversations.

data_description.memory_enabled: Privacy toggle - enable or disable the entire memory system
data_description.memory_extraction_enabled: Automatically extract memories after each conversation
data_description.memory_extraction_llm: Choose which LLM to use for extracting memories (external is more accurate but requires External LLM to be enabled)
data_description.memory_max_memories: Maximum number of memories to store (oldest/least important are removed when limit is reached)
data_description.memory_min_importance: Filter memories by LLM-assigned importance score. Lower values (0.2-0.3) keep most memories including casual mentions. Medium values (0.4-0.5) filter out minor details. Higher values (0.6-0.8) only keep significant preferences and facts. Default 0.4 provides balanced filtering.
data_description.memory_min_words: Minimum number of meaningful words (>2 characters) required for a memory to be stored. Helps filter out short, low-value memories.
data_description.memory_context_top_k: How many relevant memories to include in each conversation
data_description.memory_collection_name: Name of the ChromaDB collection for memory indexing

data_description.debug_logging: Enable detailed logging for troubleshooting (may expose sensitive data)
data_description.streaming_enabled: Enable streaming responses for low-latency TTS integration. Requires Assist Pipeline with Wyoming TTS. When enabled, responses are sent incrementally for faster audio playback. Automatically falls back to standard mode if streaming fails.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the LLM API. Please check the base URL and network connection.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid API key. Please check your credentials.
error.invalid_url: Invalid base URL format. Please enter a valid HTTP or HTTPS URL.
error.invalid_top_p: Top P must be between 0.0 and 1.0.
error.invalid_max_tokens: Max tokens must be a positive number.
error.invalid_entities: Invalid entity ID format or pattern.
error.vector_db_connection_failed: Failed to connect to ChromaDB. Please check host, port, and ensure ChromaDB is running.
error.vector_db_collection_not_found: ChromaDB collection not found. Please create the collection first.
error.invalid_top_k: Top K must be a positive integer.
error.invalid_similarity_threshold: Similarity threshold must be a positive number (typical range: 150-300).
error.invalid_history_max_messages: Max messages must be a non-negative integer.
error.invalid_history_max_tokens: Max tokens must be a non-negative integer.
error.invalid_tool_timeout: Tool timeout must be a positive number.
error.invalid_max_tool_calls: Max tool calls must be a positive integer.
error.external_llm_connection_failed: Failed to connect to external LLM API. Please check the configuration.
error.external_llm_required: Memory extraction with external LLM requires the external LLM tool to be enabled in External LLM settings.
error.invalid_proxy_headers: Invalid proxy headers format. Must be valid JSON object with string keys and values.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please check the logs for details.

reindex_entities.name: Reindex entities
reindex_entities.description: Force a full reindex of all Home Assistant entities into the vector database.

index_entity.name: Index entity
index_entity.description: Index a specific entity into the vector database.

clear_conversation.name: Clear conversation
clear_conversation.description: Clear conversation session and start fresh with no previous context. Allows users to reset voice conversations for a specific user or device, or all conversations at once.

chroma_embedded_failed.title: Embedded ChromaDB failed to start
chroma_embedded_failed.description:
Embedded ChromaDB could not start at {path}: {error}

If a ChromaDB host and port are configured, Pepa has fallen back to remote placement. Otherwise memory and vector search are running without semantic recall. Check that the persist directory is writable and that the chromadb package is installed.

pyscript_payload_missing.title: Pepa perception scripts are not installed

confirm.title: Install the Pepa perception scripts
confirm.description:
Pepa Sensory Arm reads its device catalog from a sensor published by bundled pyscript scripts that are not yet deployed on this system.

Submitting will copy {payload_files} into {pyscript_dir}, overwriting any existing files with those names. Future upgrades of Pepa Sensory Arm will silently overwrite these files again — fork the repository if you need to customize them.

The Pyscript integration must be installed, and all three of its configuration checkboxes must be enabled — including 'hass is global' — or the scripts will not load.
